scripts.clean-frontend: powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$p=(netstat -ano | Select-String ':3000' | ForEach-Object { ($_ -split '\s+')[-1] } | Where-Object { $_ -match '^\d+$' } | Select-Object -Unique); foreach($i in $p){ Stop-Process -Id ([int]$i) -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; if(Test-Path frontend/.next){ Remove-Item frontend/.next -Recurse -Force }"
